title: Editor

translation.confirmMessage: AI will translate the current resume into English and replace the original content. Save first if needed. Continue?
translation.loadingDescription: AI is translating the current resume into English. Please wait.
translation.successDescription: The resume has been translated into English. Keep this translation?
translation.undoChangedDescription: New edits were made after translation. Use the bottom toolbar undo action to avoid overwriting later changes.
translation.fallbackError: AI translation service is temporarily unavailable.

noLoginWarn: You are not logged in or have not configured local storage. Current edits will be lost after refreshing.
autoFitMinReached: Page settings are at their minimum and the content still cannot fit on one page. The compressed result is kept; click One page again to restore the original settings.

customModuleEditor.emptyContent: Nothing written yet. Click to add content.

sectionSort.collapseBeforeDrag: Collapse sections before dragging to reorder.

noResume: No resumes yet. Create one to get started.

fieldCard.pinnedFieldTooltip: The name field cannot be dragged

rename.title: Rename
rename.duplicate: A field with this name already exists in this section

photo.title: Photo
photo.description: Set how the photo appears in the resume

autoHint.fromStart: Graduation date auto-calculated based on {{degree}} duration – editable
autoHint.fromEnd: Enrollment date auto-calculated based on {{degree}} duration – editable

longTextEntry.emptyAction: No content yet. Click to add content.

discard.title: Discard current edit?
discard.message: This long text field has unsaved changes. Switching fields will discard them.

longTextEditor.description: Supports Markdown. Changes apply to the resume when done.

aiOptimize.title: AI optimization result
aiOptimize.description: Compare the original and optimized content before applying changes.
aiOptimize.loadingDescription: Your original text will not be overwritten before the result is ready.

discard.title: Discard AI optimization?
discard.message: The AI result has not been applied. Closing now will discard it and keep the resume unchanged.

longTextEditor.markdownPlaceholder: Edit long-form content here. Supports Markdown markers like **bold**, *italic*, __underline__, and lists...
longTextEditor.richTextPlaceholder: Edit long-form content here. Supports bold, italic, underline, lists, and other formatting...

toast.featureUnavailable: This feature is not available yet
toast.selectTextForFormatting: Select text before using formatting tools
toast.selectTextForList: Select text before converting it to a list
toast.selectionNotRecognized: Selection could not be recognized. Select the text again and retry.
toast.textTooShort: Text is too short. Please enter at least 5 characters.
toast.aiConfigMissing: AI service is not configured. Please configure it in Settings first.

discard.title: Discard this edit?
discard.message: Current changes have not been applied and will be lost if you close.

diagnosisPanel.title: Resume Diagnosis
diagnosisPanel.noSuggestions: Your resume looks complete. No suggestions for now.
diagnosisPanel.emptyDescription: AI scans for vague wording, overclaims, and other expression issues, then suggests improvements.
diagnosisPanel.panelEmptyDescription: Click AI Check in the bottom toolbar to diagnose wording issues in your resume.

loading.reviewing: Your resume has a lot of content. Checking each detail...

clearConfirm.title: Clear previous diagnosis?
clearConfirm.message: This will remove diagnosis highlights and close the current suggestion.

runConfirm.title: Start AI diagnosis?
runConfirm.message: AI will scan the current resume for vague or exaggerated wording and provide improvement suggestions. This may consume some quota. Continue?

missingName.title: Missing name
missingName.description: Your name is the most basic resume information. Add it before sharing.

missingContact.title: Missing contact information
missingContact.description: Add at least a phone number or email so recruiters can reach you.

missingPhone.title: Add a phone number
missingPhone.description: A phone number is the most direct contact method and is worth including.

missingEmail.title: Add an email address
missingEmail.description: Email is the standard professional contact channel and is worth including.

missingJobTarget.title: Missing target role
missingJobTarget.description: A clear target role helps recruiters judge fit quickly.

missingSummary.title: Missing profile summary
missingSummary.description: A concise summary builds a first impression quickly. Aim for 50-150 characters.

summaryTooShort.title: Profile summary is too short
summaryTooShort.description: Currently about {{count}} characters. Expand it to 50-150 characters and highlight your core strengths and career target.

missingEducation.title: Missing education
missingEducation.description: Education is an important part of a resume. Add it if available.

missingSkills.title: Missing professional skills
missingSkills.description: Core skills improve keyword matching in ATS systems.

skillsTooSimple.title: Skills section is too thin
skillsTooSimple.description: Currently about {{count}} characters. Add more skill keywords, ideally grouped by category such as languages, frameworks, and tools.

missingWork.title: Missing work experience
missingWork.description: Work experience is a core resume section and matters most for experienced candidates.

emptyWorkResults.title: Work experience lacks result descriptions
emptyWorkResults.all: None of the work entries include concrete results. This is a critical resume gap.
emptyWorkResults.some: {{count}} work entries are missing results. Add quantified outcomes where possible.

weakWorkResults.title: Work experience could be richer
weakWorkResults.description: {{count}} entries have very little detail. Add at least 2-3 highlights per entry.

workMissingMetrics.title: Work results lack metrics
workMissingMetrics.all: None of the work descriptions include measurable results. Add percentages, counts, or other metrics.
workMissingMetrics.some: {{count}} entries would benefit from metrics such as improved X% or delivered N items.

missingProjects.title: Missing projects
missingProjects.description: Projects show hands-on ability and technical depth.

emptyProjectDescription.title: Project entries lack descriptions
emptyProjectDescription.all: None of the projects include concrete descriptions.

weakProjectDescription.title: Project descriptions could be more detailed
weakProjectDescription.description: {{count}} project descriptions are thin. Consider adding context, action, and result.

projectMissingMetrics.title: Project results lack metrics
projectMissingMetrics.description: Add measurable outcomes to project descriptions to make them more convincing.

missingHonorOrCert.title: Consider adding honors or certifications
missingHonorOrCert.description: Awards or professional certifications can strengthen the resume when relevant.

duplicateWord.title: Frequent term "{{word}}" appears {{count}} times
duplicateWord.description: It appears repeatedly in {{sections}}. Consider synonyms or tighter wording.

diagnosisError.aiNotConfigured: Please set a custom API URL and key in Page Settings.
diagnosisError.networkFailed: Network request failed. Please check your connection.
diagnosisError.streamUnsupported: This browser does not support streaming responses.
diagnosisError.streamReadFailed: An error occurred while reading the streaming response.

toast.themeApplyFailed: Failed to apply theme, please try again

font.title: Font Settings
font.loading: Loading font files. The preview will update automatically.
font.loadFailed: Font loading is slow. The fallback font is being used for now.
font.misansCopyright: ⓘ MiSans font copyright belongs to Xiaomi

atsPanel.title: ATS Check
atsPanel.description: Paste a job description to compare keyword fit, content gaps, and ATS readability.
atsPanel.jdPlaceholder: Paste a job description to analyze keyword matches and content gaps
atsPanel.jobDescriptionTooShort: Paste a longer job description before analyzing.
atsPanel.emptyDescription: Paste a job description to start analyzing keyword fit and suggestions.

exportConfirm.title: Export with low ATS score?
exportConfirm.message: The current ATS score is {{score}}/100. You can still export, but reviewing the ATS suggestions first may improve delivery results.

jdLength.ok: This length is usually safe for ATS analysis.
jdLength.warning: This JD is a bit long. Consider keeping the core responsibilities and requirements.
jdLength.danger: This JD may be too long and could make AI analysis unstable. Remove boilerplate, benefits, and duplicate text if possible.

error.network: Network request failed. Please check your connection and retry.
error.failed: ATS analysis failed. Please retry or switch to another model.

progress.title: Analyzing ATS match
progress.streaming: AI is analyzing the JD and resume...
progress.successDescription: Match score, keywords, and suggestions are ready
